scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @maskari/server" "npm run dev -w @maskari/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @maskari/shared && npm run build -w @maskari/server && npm run build -w @maskari/client
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=production SERVE_CLIENT=true npm run start -w @maskari/server
